Life at Flannery's

Every day is an opportunity to live well

Daily life

A day at Flannery's

No two days are the same at Flannery's, because no two residents are the same. From relaxed mornings with a newspaper and tea to afternoon activities filled with laughter, we create opportunities for joy and connection every single day.

Residents are encouraged to keep the routines they love and personalise their own spaces with familiar items from home. Our day rooms are warm and welcoming — a big family living room where everyone is at ease.

Families are always welcome. We encourage visits, shared meals, and staying involved in daily life as much as everyone wishes.

Activities

Something for everyone

Our activities programme is designed around what our residents actually enjoy.

Arts & crafts

Painting, knitting, card-making and seasonal crafts. Creative expression is wonderful for wellbeing.

Music & singing

Music sessions, sing-alongs, and live entertainment. Music lifts spirits and connects people.

Gentle exercise

Chair-based exercises, gentle movement, and walks in the garden. Staying active supports wellbeing.

Social events

Birthday celebrations, seasonal parties, bingo, quizzes, and family days. A busy social calendar.

Reminiscence

Guided conversation and memory activities. Particularly meaningful for residents with dementia.

Spiritual care

Mass, prayer groups, and pastoral visits. For residents who value their faith, spiritual care matters.

Our spaces

Spaces that feel like home

Resident bedrooms
Our gardens
Dining room
Main lounge
Our kitchen
